name: missing_sentinel
description: Elided posting amount (no number on Equity:Opening) surfaces as {"__missing__": true} at parse tier. Check-tier adapters (v2/v3) resolve it to -100.00 USD via interpolation. Expected omits `units` for the elided posting so both parse-tier and check-tier adapters satisfy containment.
source:
2024-01-01 open Assets:Checking USD
2024-01-01 open Equity:Opening

2024-01-02 * "balance seed"
  Assets:Checking    100.00 USD
  Equity:Opening
